idea-plugin.name: Git Merge Tool
idea-plugin.description:
Git Merge Tool

Merge one source branch into multiple target branches with just a few clicks.

Features

  • Multi-branch merge — select a source branch and merge into multiple targets at once
  • Branch search/filter — quickly find branches by typing
  • Saved profiles — save source + target configurations (e.g., "Staging", "Production")
  • Push confirmation — asks before pushing each merged branch
  • Conflict detection — automatically aborts and reports conflicts
  • Execution log — detailed log of all git operations

Usage

  1. Open any Git project
  2. Go to Tools > Git Merge Tool > Abrir Merge Tool or press Ctrl+Shift+M
  3. Select the source branch
  4. Check the target branches
  5. Click "INICIAR MERGE"

Perfect for teams that maintain multiple environment branches (staging, production, feature branches) and need to propagate changes quickly.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0

  • Initial release
  • Multi-branch merge with source/target selection
  • Branch search and filtering
  • Profile management (save/load/delete)
  • Push confirmation after each merge
  • Conflict detection and auto-abort
